children.text: Atome, the multi-market BNPL payment method, is now available for Singapore and Malaysia. Atome supports both ecommerce and POS (static and dynamic QR). With Atome shoppers can split purchases into 3 interest-free installments.

excerpt: Multi-market BNPL for Singapore and Malaysia that supports ecommerce and POS (static and dynamic QR), enabling shoppers to split purchases into 3 interest-free installments.

content_features.title: BNPL installments at checkout
content_features.description: Offer Atome so eligible shoppers can split a purchase into 3 interest-free installments.

content_features.title: Coverage: Singapore and Malaysia
content_features.description: Designed for merchants operating in or selling to supported markets; confirm country eligibility in your PSP configuration.

content_features.title: Authorization success and declines
content_features.description: Track Atome-specific authorization/confirmation outcomes separately from cards; optimize your checkout copy and customer prompts to reduce avoidable drop-offs.

content_features.title: Refund support
content_features.description: Supports refunds, including partial refunds, based on your PSP’s capabilities for Atome transactions.

content_features.title: Disputes and chargebacks handling
content_features.description: Where applicable, manage disputes through your PSP’s dispute workflow and keep order/fulfillment evidence ready.

content_features.title: Recurring and post-payment operations
content_features.description: Depending on your PSP setup, Atome can support recurring and multiple partial operations; validate what’s enabled for your merchant account.

content_features.title: Online acceptance
content_features.description: Atome supports ecommerce and other online payment flows.

content_features.title: In-person acceptance
content_features.description: Atome supports in-person checkout and POS acceptance.

tip: If Atome payments are declining or dropping off, review your Atome-specific payment status/response codes in your PSP.

faq.question: What is Atome?
faq.answer: Atome is a buy now, pay later (BNPL) payment method that allows shoppers to split purchases into installments at checkout.

faq.question: Where is Atome available?
faq.answer: Based on the referenced payment method listing, Atome is available for Singapore and Malaysia. Availability can vary by PSP configuration and merchant entity.

faq.question: Can I accept Atome in-store and online?
faq.answer: Yes—Atome can be used for ecommerce and POS, including static and dynamic QR flows, depending on how your PSP has enabled the method.

faq.question: Why are Atome payments being declined or not completing?
faq.answer: Review the payment result/status and any refusal/response codes returned by your PSP for Atome transactions. Common issues include shopper eligibility, incorrect flow configuration, or customer drop-off during authorization/confirmation.

faq.question: Does Atome support multiple currencies?
faq.answer: Atome availability and settlement behavior depend on your PSP and market setup, so confirm supported shopper and settlement currencies in your integration.

seo.seo_description: Atome overview for merchants covering payments, acceptance, security, and operations.
seo.keywords: Atome, Atome payment provider, Atome approval rate, Atome card declines, payment network, merchant payments
